phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tip box is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a caixa de gorjetas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH KEYE-shuh DIH goo-ruh-ZHEH-tuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Tip boxes are not always visible; staff can direct you.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tip box is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a caixa de gorjetas, por favor?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-deh FEE-kah ah KY-shah jee gor-ZHEH-tahs por fah-VOR (link "de" smoothly to next word)
phrases.cultural_note: Tipping is optional in Portugal. The box is typically near the entrance or register.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto ao balcão.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW bahl-KOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's next to the counter.

responses.english: Good morning, it's next to the counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW bahl-KOWN.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica junto ao balcão.

likely_response.local: Pode deixar a gorjeta na caixa própria ao balcão ou entregar diretamente ao empregado de mesa.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih day-SHAHR AH goo-ruh-ZHEH-tuh NUH KEYE-shuh PRAWPR-yuh OW bahl-KOWN OHW ayngt-rih-GAHR dee-rih-tuh-MAYNG-tih OW aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Where can I leave the tip?

responses.english: Where can I leave the tip?
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih day-SHAHR AH goo-ruh-ZHEH-tuh NUH KEYE-shuh PRAWPR-yuh OW bahl-KOWN OHW ayngt-rih-GAHR dee-rih-tuh-MAYNG-tih OW aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh.
responses.french: Pode deixar a gorjeta na caixa própria ao balcão ou entregar diretamente ao empregado de mesa.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso ver a carta de vinhos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo VEHR AH KAH-ruh-tuh DIH VEE-nyoosh?

likely_response.local: Peça a carta de vinhos ao nosso empregado de mesa.
likely_response.pronunciation: PEH-suh AH KAH-ruh-tuh DIH VEE-nyoosh OW NAW-soo aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask our waiter for the wine list.

responses.english: Ask our waiter for the wine list.
responses.phonetic: PEH-suh AH KAH-ruh-tuh DIH VEE-nyoosh OW NAW-soo aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh.
responses.french: Peça a carta de vinhos ao nosso empregado de mesa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the wine list is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a carta de vinhos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH KAH-ruh-tuh DIH VEE-nyoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese restaurants, the wine list is often kept at the bar or with the staff.

likely_response.local: Pode deixar na caixa de gorjetas ou perguntar ao empregado de mesa.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih day-SHAHR NUH KEYE-shuh DIH goo-ruh-ZHEH-tuhsh OHW peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR OW aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can leave it in the tip box or ask the waiter.

responses.english: You can leave it in the tip box or ask the waiter.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih day-SHAHR NUH KEYE-shuh DIH goo-ruh-ZHEH-tuhsh OHW peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR OW aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh.
responses.french: Pode deixar na caixa de gorjetas ou perguntar ao empregado de mesa.

likely_response.local: Pode deixar a gorjeta no prato ou na caixa de gorjetas ao balcão.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih day-SHAHR AH goo-ruh-ZHEH-tuh NOO PRAH-too OHW NUH KEYE-shuh DIH goo-ruh-ZHEH-tuhsh OW bahl-KOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Where can I leave the tip? You can leave the tip on the plate or in the tip box at the counter.

responses.english: Where can I leave the tip? You can leave the tip on the plate or in the tip box at the counter.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih day-SHAHR AH goo-ruh-ZHEH-tuh NOO PRAH-too OHW NUH KEYE-shuh DIH goo-ruh-ZHEH-tuhsh OW bahl-KOWN.
responses.french: Pode deixar a gorjeta no prato ou na caixa de gorjetas ao balcão.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the card reader is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a leitora de cartão?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH lay-TOH-ruh DIH kuh-ruh-TOWN?
phrases.cultural_note: Card payments are standard. The terminal is always located at the main counter.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica no balcão de pagamento.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO bahl-KOWN DIH puh-guh-MAYNG-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's at the payment counter.

responses.english: Good morning, it's at the payment counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO bahl-KOWN DIH puh-guh-MAYNG-too.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica no balcão de pagamento.
